personal-dashboard-active-discussions-ti: Title for the Active discussions module of the PersonalDashboard.
personal-dashboard-active-discussions-de: Description for the Active discussions module of the PersonalDashboard.
personal-dashboard-active-discussions-la: Label that precedes the time when the latest comment in a thread was made.
personal-dashboard-active-discussions-to: Label that is used when the latest comment date is today.
personal-dashboard-active-discussions-mo: Label that precedes the time when the latest comment in a thread was made.
Descriptor of when the last comment was made in a discussion, if it was made on the same day the discussion is being viewed.
Label for a button that navigates a user to the complete list of active discussions on mobile.
Aria label for a button that shows more active discussions in its mobile version
personal-dashboard-active-discussions-pr: Aria label for the progress bar
